zh.Ramsbury, Wiltshire England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾拉姆斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Carpenter於1470年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾時，他的父親William Carpenter of Homme30歲，母親Lady Agnes Homme26歲。他於1490年與Susan Trevelyan在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1503年7月2日在英國英格蘭維爾爾拉姆斯波利 曼諾享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Carpenter于1470年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾时，他的父亲William Carpenter of Homme30岁，母亲Lady Agnes Homme26岁。他于1490年与Susan Trevelyan在英国英格兰維爾爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1503年7月2日在英国英格兰維爾爾拉姆斯波利 曼諾享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carpenter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): occupational name for a worker in wood, Norman French carpentier (from Late Latin carpentarius ‘cartwright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Zimmermann  , French   Charpentier  , Italian   Carpentieri  , or cognates and equivalents in various other languages.

variants.name: Zimmermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Fritz, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Gerd, Manfred, Wolfgang, Bernhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a carpenter, Middle High German zimberman (a compound of zimber, zim(m)er ‘timber, wood’ + man ‘man’), German Zimmermann.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Carpenter was born in 1470, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Carpenter of Homme, was 30 and his mother, Lady Agnes Homme, was 26. He married Susan Trevelyan in 1490, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 2 July 1503, in Ramsbury Manor, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Carpenter est né en 1470, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Carpenter of Homme, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Homme, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Susan Trevelyan en 1490, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 juillet 1503, à Ramsbury Manor, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Carpenterが1470年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Carpenter of Hommeは30歳，母Lady Agnes Hommeは26歳であった。1490年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでSusan Trevelyanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1503年7月2日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアラムスブリー マノーで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Carpenter(이)가 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Carpenter of Homme(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes Homme(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 Susan Trevelyan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1503년 7월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 램스버이 먼어에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Susan Trevelyan em 1490, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Carpenter родился в 1470 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Carpenter of Homme было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Homme, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Susan Trevelyan в 1490 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 2 июля 1503 г. в местности рамсбури манор, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.
